title: Weekly Legal Risk Review
summary: Weekly Legal Risk Review is the repeatable legal / risk cadence that keeps signal, ownership, and execution aligned.

steps.title: Prepare the review
steps.description: Collect the minimal signal needed to make the conversation useful.

steps.title: Run the cadence
steps.description: Review what changed, what matters now, and what needs intervention.

steps.title: Capture decisions
steps.description: Document the decisions, owners, and deadlines immediately.

steps.title: Close the loop
steps.description: Check completion before the next cycle and adjust the system if it is drifting.

kpis.target: 100% of planned reviews happen on time

whenToImplement: Install weekly legal risk review as soon as legal / risk work spans multiple priorities or owners.
delegationNotes: This system becomes easier to delegate once the review format and escalation rules are explicit.
automationNotes: Automate the preparation and capture steps first; keep the core decision conversation human.
